case_title: RIODAN SHANNON et al VS LANE CHRISTOPHER T. DBA 1400 WASHINGTON ST. ASSOC.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LANE CHRISTOPHER T.
